name: piechart
description: Pie or donut chart with legend — proportional wedges.
purpose: Use for part-to-whole breakdowns with 3–6 slices. Add `donut` modifier for a hole in the middle (cleaner for executive decks).

slices.description: One li per slice. Format: `Label — value` (values are proportional).

skeleton:
<!-- _class: piechart donut -->

`H1 2026 · 1,840 person-hours`

## Where the engineering quarter went.

Wedges drawn proportionally; legend reads in author order with raw values.

- Codebook platform `46%`
- Operations runbook `22%`
- Compliance work `18%`
- Pilot support `9%`
- Toil and on-call `5%`
